characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, light brown complexion. He has dark hair, a goatee, and wears round gold-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a black beanie, a dark teal t-shirt, and a gold chain necklace.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मैंने अपनी English speaking कैसे improve की, सिर्फ एक change से? Watch this. [How did I improve my English speaking, with just one change? Watch this.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable success story.
- Establishes a direct, conversational tone.
- Sets up the "one simple change" premise to keep them watching.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English speaking
improved
with just
one change
Watch

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hi, myself Rahul... I am wanting this job because... wait, uh, actually... I want this job because... [Hi, myself Rahul... I am wanting this job because... wait, uh, actually... I want this job because...]
Character A says: Look at that. Instant feedback. Normally, English बोलते हुए डर लगता है कि कोई judge करेगा, but not anymore. Supernova का AI tutor बिना judge किए मेरी गलतियां सुधारता है। [Look at that. Instant feedback. Normally, I feel scared speaking English thinking someone will judge, but not anymore. Supernova's AI tutor corrects my mistakes without judging.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value (AI tutor practice).
- Shows the user making natural mistakes and getting instant, non-judgmental correction.
- Addresses the emotional pain point of feeling judged while speaking English.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: And you can practice anywhere. Note to self: Supernova पर रोज़ दस मिनट practice करनी है ASAP. Try it yourself and see your confidence grow. Fire emoji. [And you can practice anywhere. Note to self: I have to practice on Supernova for ten minutes daily ASAP. Try it yourself and see your confidence grow. Fire emoji.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the habit of daily practice across devices.
- Delivers a clear, encouraging Call to Action (CTA).
- Ends on a high-energy, confident note.
